title: Open Kitty with Yazi in Current Finder Directory

rules.description: Right Command + Y to open Kitty with Yazi (only in Finder)

to.shell_command: /bin/zsh -lc 'finder_dir=$(osascript -e '\''tell application "Finder" to POSIX path of (target of front window as alias)'\''); exec /Users/nom/.zsh/bin/kitty-launch --os-window --cwd "$finder_dir" --title " yazi " -- yazi'
